overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval town at night. The character moves from an open riverside promenade through a plaza and market area, then descends into narrow alleyways. The environment features timber-framed buildings, cobblestone streets, and warm firelight contrasting against the blue night sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path beside the water, passing lit braziers and approaching a gazebo

entered.detail: multi-story medieval building with dark wooden beams and lit windows
wooden posts and rails separating the path from the water canal
metal fire basket burning with orange flames
octagonal wooden bandstand with a pointed roof in the town square ahead
dark water visible beyond the wooden railing

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a cobblestone riverside path at night, passing warm fire braziers. Timber-framed buildings line the left side while a wooden fence separates the path from the water canal on the right. Ahead, a wooden gazebo is visible in the town square.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square with central gazebo and market stalls

events.description: moves from riverside path into open town square with paved tile ground

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza, circling around the central gazebo structure

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor standing near the gazebo

entered.detail: open square with patterned stone tile paving
circular stone edge of a fountain structure
wooden market stall with canvas awning

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide town square with patterned tile paving. The character walks around the wooden gazebo at the center while passing market stalls. A guard in red armor stands near the gazebo, and the timber-framed buildings now appear closer on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: market district with guard patrols and wooden stalls

events.description: begins following a guard carrying a lit torch through the market

agents.ego_description: following a guard in red armor who is carrying a lit torch through the market area with stalls

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor carrying a lit torch walking ahead of the character
guard standing by wooden crates watching the area

entered.detail: market stall with wooden frame and goods displayed
low stone wall with wooden capstones
stacked wooden cargo crates near the stall

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a market district with wooden stalls and crates, following a guard carrying a torch. The ground returns to cobblestone, and stone barriers line the right side. Other guards in red armor are posted near the stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway between stone buildings with descending stairs

events.description: enters narrow alleyway between high stone walls leaving the open market
begins descending stone stairs in the narrow passage

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow alley and descending stone stairs, following the torch-bearing guard into the lower town

notable_agents.action: guard continuing down the stairs ahead with torch

entered.detail: tall stone brick wall forming the alley side
tall stone brick wall on the opposite side of the alley
cobblestone steps descending between the walls
wall-mounted torch providing warm light in the narrow passage
wooden eaves and roof extending over the alley

segments.scene_description: The environment becomes enclosed as the character enters a narrow alley between high stone brick walls. The sky disappears overhead, replaced by wooden roof overhangs. The character descends stone stairs illuminated by wall-mounted torches, following the guard deeper into the lower sections of the town.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval town at night, transitioning from an open riverside promenade into a claustrophobic lower alleyway. It begins along a cobblestone path lined with timber-framed buildings and warm fire braziers, moving past a wooden fence that separates the walkway from a dark water canal. As the path opens into a wide town square, the camera circles a central wooden gazebo and passes market stalls and guards in red armor under a vast night sky. The scene then shifts into a bustling market district filled with crates and torch-bearing guards before the environment tightens significantly. Finally, the camera enters a narrow alley between high stone walls where the sky is obscured by wooden roof overhangs, descending stone stairs illuminated by wall torches into the depths of the town.
